svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(212, 230, 241), rgb(29, 45, 54)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 82, 118), rgb(135, 183, 214));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 179px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a5276;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#1a5276, #87b7d6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 203, 167), rgb(89, 52, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 65px; margin-left: 51px;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(169, 204, 227), rgb(42, 72, 92)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 82, 118), rgb(135, 183, 214));
